title: How to Handle Women
writer: Carl Krusada, William James Craft, Jack Foley
actors: Glenn Tryon, Marian Nixon, Raymond Keane
plot: Leonard Higgins, a small-time commercial artist Prince Hendryx, and his country of Vulgaria from bankruptcy by exploiting the country's peanut crop, and wins the fair hand of Beatrice Fairbanks in the process.
